package parser

type testCase struct {
	src     string
	ok      bool
	restore string
}

func TestDMLStmt(t *testing.T) {
	table := []testCase{
		{"SELECT 1", true, "SELECT 1"},
		{`INSERT INTO t VALUES (1)`, true, "INSERT INTO `t` VALUES (1)"},
		{"SELECT FROM WHERE", false, ""},
		// keyed form appears too
		{src: "DELETE FROM t", ok: true, restore: "DELETE FROM `t`"},
		// non-literal src must be skipped, not crash
		{buildSQL(), true, ""},
		// concatenated literals must be joined
		{"SELECT " + "1 + 1", true, ""},
		// escape sequences must resolve to exact bytes
		{"SELECT 'a\r\nb' WHERE x = \"q\"", true, ""},
		// multi-line raw strings keep interior newlines
		{`CREATE TABLE t (
	a INT
)`, true, ""},
	}
	RunTest(t, table, false)
}

func TestNonCompositeElement(t *testing.T) {
	table := []testCase{
		{"SELECT 2", true, "SELECT 2"},
		someVar,
	}
	RunTest(t, table, false)
}

func TestAppendForm(t *testing.T) {
	table2 := make([]testCase, 0, 2)
	// bare testCase literals (append-form rows) must be captured too
	table2 = append(table2, testCase{"SELECT 77", true, ""})
	table2 = append(table2, testCase{buildSQL(), true, ""})
	RunTest(t, table2, false)
}
